Lupine Dagger  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 18
DMG: 9 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
DEX: +4 WIS: +4
Effect: Greater Wolf Form (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 45
WT: 0.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: RNG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

DMG: 9 Dmg Bonus: 35

Post Comment
My $0.02
QuoteReply
# Aug 05 2016 at 7:58 PM Rating: Decent
Sitellious
18 posts
At level 45 this gives me the capability to use Greater Wolf form which i can only get until level 59.
This proc is a major boost to your performance and safety as a ranger between level 45 and 58. If things are going downhill you can out run anything. hehe

312 posts
Why would it not stack with haste, ot increases MOVEMENT speed, like SoW, not attack speed, like haste
▲ Page top
RE: stack?
QuoteReply
# Oct 24 2005 at 7:47 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593966906286
Scholar
36 posts
2: Increase AGI by 60
3: Increase DEX by 50
4: Increase ATK by 53
5: Increase Attack Speed by 68%
6: Increase Chance to Critical Hit by 20%
Thats from speed of salik, And it does have attack in it =D.

▲ Page top
Lupine
QuoteReply
# Nov 01 2002 at 12:54 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757690155
84 posts
Just reached 45th level and Lupine dagger immediatly procced greater wolf form. Procs against any level mobs. Greater wolf form fell off during one fight only to be reestablished immediatly by the weapon proccing again.

My attack damage increases significantly while in greater wolf form, not to mention the running speed increase.

This in primany hand and my LSoEE in my off hand equals super fast damage.
▲ Page top
Luckiest Ranger in EQ
QuoteReply
# Sep 01 2002 at 8:13 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591781324602
1 post
Ok I have realized after speaking with many people, that I must be the luckiest Ranger in EQ. I was in the Oasis lastnight fighting specs, when our party got wiped out by a bad pull. A group member got a lvl 54 Cleric to rezz us all and after chatting with her for a few she asked what our classes were, I told her Ranger, and she said "Oh well maybe you can use this" and hands over a Lupine Dagger. She was initially going to just give it to me, but I asked her how much she was selling it for, having NO IDEA what it was worth, and she said whatever you wanna give me....soooo I had 9pp on me at the time, she said we had a deal. So I got my Lupine Dagger for 9pp from the kindest Cleric out there! NOW I just cannot wait for it to proc!! Gotta get my Piercing skill up there in the mean time.

Lunarstar - Ranger of the 34th season

▲ Page top
For Sale
QuoteReply
# Jul 01 2002 at 3:59 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592759265015
32 posts
I am a 45 Shaman on Tarew Marr. I picked this bad boy up the other night while grouped with 4 Monks and a Cleric. With 4 monks we (they) were pretty much owning the zone. Anway here's how the night started...After about 10 or so pulls the Capt. comes running down the lane. We just finished off a mob and were ready to go. We didn't know who pulled it, but we didn't care. The Monks pretty much owned him with some help from the Cleric =). Soon as we keeled him this Pally comes running by and asks for a res for his friend who pulled him and got owned in 5 seconds. We did a rand 1000 for the dagger and needless to say I won (773). The guy who looted it when LD and everyone thought that he wasn't going to come back and give it to me. I was a bit disappointed, but since it was Ranger only I wasn't crushed like a Ranger would have been. About two minutes later to everyone's surprise this guy logs back on and gives me the dagger =). The rest of the night we explored the zone and were about to camp the WL but it was getting late and I told them that I needed to log. So since I'm a Shaman without an alt Ranger and have no close nit Ranger friends =( I am selling this prized weapon.

Merdenoms (Clan Dragonhawk)
45 Shaman on Tarew Marr

hmm..
QuoteReply
# May 24 2002 at 5:24 AM Rating: Decent

8 posts
I think what people fail to see is that this procs GREATER WOLF FORM, not wolf form, a lvl 56 ranger spell.....so the proc is a great buff for many stats!

40 or 45???
QuoteReply
# May 08 2002 at 5:06 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361156509
2 posts
I got mine Last week end for 1k and traded a lammy for it, I heard it procs at 40 or 45 which one is it?

Iyen
35th Season
Ranger of the Rathe
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 12 2002 at 8:34 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Lupine dagger is nice and all, but if you paid 1k, and traded a Lammy for it, then your a doofus.
RE: 40 or 45???
QuoteReply
# Oct 21 2002 at 12:41 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591774066779
Scholar
103 posts
Well, I don't know about A-Ro, but since these go for 4-5k on Drinal, and Lammy's go for 2-3k, i would say he actually got a decent deal. If you don;t need the 6sta on the lammy to break 101, you're going to be doing a lot better off with the lupine...
- Better ratio (slightly)
- dex and wis (2 of those stats that we rangers love)
- 6str on lammy = 6atk
- Proc on lupine = around 50atk (ok, you do the math on that one)

I'd say if you're safely over the 101sta barrier, the lupine is a much better alternative (or Maybe Defiance for the 10ac /shrug)
▲ Page top
I Woov Doz Ding
QuoteReply
# Apr 01 2002 at 8:07 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591764236019
99 posts
ok ok so I'm not an ogre but I am a halfbreed lol. I bought this yesterday for 4k on the nameless and used it all day today. I just put it in main hand till it procs then put my Longsword of etheral energy back in hand and hack away. They affect lasted almost two whole hours which is sweet and it always proc'd on the first fight after equiping it. So get one if you can it is sweet.

Best Weapon Ever for a ranger. Ive got got Lupine in main lammy in offhand and FBSS for kicks. It hits really fast and proc adds a lot to attack. ITS SO AWESOME.

BUY IT!!!!
(not too expensive got mine for 2.5k and CLS trade)

Aarop Crystalyn - 51 Pathfinder

# Oct 12 2002 at 8:37 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1595780119357
View User Forum
166 posts
You do realize of course that with the low delay of these weapons, that the measly 21% haste of the FBSS goes completely unnoticed, and that you would be doin' yourself a favor to trash it and get a better waste item?
▲ Page top
RE: This Rules
QuoteReply
# Oct 29 2002 at 9:03 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252030539
4 posts
What?! 21 percent haste means you hit 21 percent faster no matter how fast/slow delay your weapons have. Meaning 21 percent more hits, and therefore more damage. If you cant notice the difference you can just trust it will be there.

Wierd post.

lupine dagger
QuoteReply
# Feb 13 2002 at 10:00 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591772135363
1 post
I bought one last night for 6k on Quellious. Nice weapon. I'll never need to taunt again. Our Guild Cleric Leilah is going to have a heart attack trying to heal me.....or rez me! I use it and a dragon horn yak at least until I can get a Flamesong. But als now i'm broke so its of to Rathe to pillage some hg's.
▲ Page top
Ranger Piercing Story
QuoteReply
# Jan 23 2002 at 10:59 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592343422736
12 posts
When I turned 39 I heard about this dagger and got upset that my piercing was like 2 yes 2. So i bought a Dragon Horn YAK 8/23 and when I grouped in DL I put it in my secondary and low and behold my piercing after about 2 hours RL playing time went up to 105 and the YAK was procing 2 times a fight on average with 120 DEX. The next day I logged onto my mule in EC and found a Wizzard who looted it in KC and paid around 8K for it in cash and trades. I got him to TL me to DL and put the thing to work in my primary hand and in less than 1 hour RL my piercing was at 200 no kidding. I to this day still fell like I got a great deal, as my bonus is 5. Currently I am LVL 43 and am playing feverishly to hit 45 (never looked so forward to a hell level in all my life LOL.)

Moral: If your piercing sucks dont worry about it put a fast weapon in the off hand and watch the "You have increased your skill in Piercing (X)". I am currently using a smoldering brand in my secondary and now my 1hb is at 101 and it procs around 3 to 4 times a fight.

Dual wield really is a plus more than I ever realized.
▲ Page top
love my Lupine
QuoteReply
# Jan 13 2002 at 3:04 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591770841424
Scholar
240 posts
IMO the Lupine...rocks.
great ratio, low delay, dex and wis stats, GWF, awesome look, and best of all- ranger only. This weapon is a ranger hook-up by all means. I have owned once since I got the drop in KC, in the late 40s, and will never get rid of it. When a way better replacement weap comes my way, ( Crossing fingers for Defiance :P ) I will simply wait for the GWF proc, which is very often, then toss it in my inventory trunk, with the other goodies I alternate with. I will never let my lupine go...just grew to damn fond of it lol. Anyways, great ranger weapon, without a doubt.

Skulreaver Swiftblade
52 Pathfinder Eci
▲ Page top
/sigh
QuoteReply
# Jan 04 2002 at 1:32 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591773642002
View User Forum
15 posts
First off, the Lupine Dagger *is* better than a Lamentation. Although the Lamentation has slightly better stats (Dex and Wis are still nice for a Ranger), the Lupine has both a better ratio AND a lower delay...

.. which means that the damage bonus you get as you level up from 28+ is more effective on the Lupe than it is on the Lammy for your primary hand. :P Do the math!

Level 28
Lupine = 10/18
Lammy = 10/19

Level 34
Lupine = 12/18
Lammy = 12/19

Level 49
Lupine = 17/18
Lammy = 17/19

Level 58

Lupine = 20/18
Lammy = 20/19

etc, etc...

The Lupine's ratio gets even "More Better" than the Lamentation's as time goes on. I'm certainly not saying the Lammy sucks... it's a fine weapon... but throw in the proc at 45+ and there's no contest for what a Ranger would rather have, unless they just refuse to do anything but 1HS.

Only two downsides to the Lupine is it's low-delay taunt (easily manageable by a slower secondary) and the fact that it looks like a Walrus Tooth. Can't have everything I suppose.

Even if used in the secondary, the Lupe still has a better ratio. /shrug. So it's just better.
▲ Page top
RE: /sigh
QuoteReply
# Mar 19 2003 at 3:45 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591775566052
117 posts
Damage bonus doesn't get added to the damage of the weapon. It's merely a +amount per damage hit. So, a 9/19 weapon is still a 9/19 weapon. However, every time you hit with your main hand, you will get the regular damage + damage bonus.

If you don't believe me, compare you min/max hit for a weapon when in mainhand as opposed to offhand.
▲ Page top
oh for real?
QuoteReply
# Dec 20 2001 at 9:53 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591767289581
17 posts
ummm lupine dagger is lore, you cannot have two...
